pi_items.source: setup_task.sh line 60: File created by python-docx with document containing a 5x5 table (Region header + 4 regions, Q1-Q4 headers + quarterly data)

task.json description (line 5) and verifier.py (lines 46, 123-128): Chart title must match this exact string
task.json description (line 5) and verifier.py (lines 47, 139-145): X-axis label represents the first column of the table containing region names (North, South, East, West)

setup_task.sh lines 35-41: Table has 5 columns (Region, Q1, Q2, Q3, Q4). When charted with Region as X-axis categories, Q1/Q2/Q3/Q4 become 4 data series

privileged_info_summary: The task creates a synthetic LibreOffice Writer document containing a 5x5 table with quarterly regional revenue data for 4 regions (North, South, East, West) across 4 quarters (Q1-Q4). The input file /home/ga/Documents/sales_report.odt is generated by setup_task.sh using python-docx. The task requires inserting a Column or Bar chart with title '2024 Regional Revenue Trends', X-axis label 'Region', and Y-axis label 'Revenue ($M)', with 4 data series representing the quarterly columns. The output must be saved to /home/ga/Documents/sales_report_final.odt.
